zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore於1367年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里時，她的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond23歲，母親Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond17歲。她和John De Barry 7th Baron至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1406年在愛爾蘭享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore于1367年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克里时，她的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond23岁，母亲Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond17岁。她和John De Barry 7th Baron至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1406年在爱尔兰享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Ellice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

variants.name: Elly
meanings: Pet form of any of the numerous girls' names beginning with the syllable El-, in particular Eleanor . At the beginning of the 21st century it enjoyed a surge in popularity as an independent given name, often also used in compounds such as Ellie-Ann, Ellie-Mae, and Ellie-Louise.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore was born in 1367, in County Kerry, Ireland, her father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, was 23 and her mother, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, was 17. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with John De Barry 7th Baron. She died in 1406, in Ireland, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore est née en 1367, à County Kerry, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec John De Barry 7th Baron. Elle est décédée en 1406, à Irlande, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore 1367 in County Kerry, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond 23 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond 17. Sie hatte mit John De Barry 7th Baron mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1406 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore è nata il nel 1367 nel County Kerry, Irlanda, sua padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con John De Barry 7th Baron. Morì nel 1406, nel Irlanda, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymoreが1367年にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmondは23歳，母Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmondは17歳であった。彼女はJohn De Barry 7th Baronとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1406年にアイルランドで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore(이)가 1367년 아일랜드 카운티 케리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 John De Barry 7th Baron(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 아일랜드에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore nasceu em 1367, em County Kerry, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com John De Barry 7th Baron. Ela faleceu em 1406, em Irlanda, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore родилась в 1367 г. в местности коунти кирри, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от John De Barry 7th Baron. Она умерла в 1406 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellice FitzMaurice 7th Baroness of Barrymore nació en 1367, en County Kerry, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con John De Barry 7th Baron. Murió en 1406, en Irlanda, a la edad de 39 años.
